---
title: "Draft Quarto document"
author: "Your Name"
format: html
---

## Header 1

```{r setup}
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(snakecase)
```

```{r}```
## Importing new data
```{r}
here("data-raw/nurses-stress/stress/5C/5C_1586886626/HR.csv.gz") |>
  read_csv(
    show_col_types = FALSE,
    name_repair = to_snake_case,
    n_max = 100
  )
```
## Exercise: Reading other files
```{r}
here("data-raw/nurses-stress/stress/5C/5C_1586886712//HR.csv.gz") |>
  read_csv(
    show_col_types = FALSE,
    name_repair = to_snake_case
  )
```
```{r}
here("data-raw/nurses-stress/stress/5C/5C_1586886712//HR.csv.gz") |>
  read_csv(
    show_col_types = FALSE,
    name_repair = to_snake_case,
    n_max = 100
  )
``` 
```{r}
here("data-raw/nurses-stress/stress/6B/6B_1587569373//EDA.csv.gz") |>
  read_csv(
    show_col_types = FALSE,
    name_repair = to_snake_case,
    n_max = 100
  )
``` 
## Creating a function
```{r}
#' Add two numbers together.
#'
#' @param num1 A number here.
#' @param num2 A number here.
#'
#' @return Returns the sums of two numbers
#'
add_numbers <- function(num1, num2) {
  added <- num1 + num2
  return(added)
}
```

```{r}
#' Read in one nurses' stress data file
#'
#' @param file_path A path to a data file
#'
#' @return outputs a data frame/ tibble
#'
read <- function(file_path) {
  file_path |>
    read_csv(
      show_col_types = FALSE,
      name_repair = to_snake_case,
      n_max = 100
    )
}
```

```{r}
here("data-raw/nurses-stress/stress/6B/6B_1587569373//EDA.csv.gz") |>
  read()
```

```{r}
here("data-raw/nurses-stress/stress/5C/5C_1586886712//HR.csv.gz") |>
  read()
```
